name: HWR_FLW_FLOW_VL
query: SELECT B.FLOW_ID, B.SOURCE_ID, B.UUID, B.NAME, B.IS_SEEDED_DATA, B.IS_INTERNAL, T.DESCRIPTION, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM HWR_FLW_FLOW_B B, HWR_FLW_FLOW_TL T WHERE B.FLOW_ID = T.FLOW_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
